description: realestate.com.au is an Australian property marketplace operated by REA Group. It provides home buyers, renters, agents, and partners with property listing, lead, and related real-estate platform services.
summary: realestate.com.au exposes a public MCP server at `https://chatestate.realestate.com.au/mcp`, and its partner documentation advertises a large REA Partner Platform of HTTP APIs, but the scraped public docs did not reveal machine-readable specs, concrete base URLs, or confirmed auth mechanics for those APIs.
